If you received this fax in error, please visit www.athenahealth.com/NotMyFax to notify the sender and confirm that the information will be
destroyed. If you do not have internet access, please call 1-888-482-8436 to notify the sender and confirm that the information will be
destroyed. Thank you for your attention and cooperation. [ID:29068-H-34022]
